# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1 # for versions before 1.8.0 use extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-dep 
  labels:
    app: nodejs
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector: 
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs
  template: 
    metadata: 
      labels: 
        app: nodejs
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-container
        image: <INSERT YOUR DOCKERID>/nodejs-web:latest
        env: 
          - name: MONGO_SERVICE
            valueFrom: 
              fieldRef: 
                apiVersion: v1
                fieldPath: spec.clusterIP
        resources:
          limits: 
            cpu: 20m
            memory: 30Mi
